rules: R-04: End-of-Turn Heat: heat += level*heatMultiplier. Affects NEXT turn only.
R-05: End-of-Turn Energy: throttle decided by heat after actions, before R-04. energy += actualProd.
R-07: Stall: if status!=WON and actualProd==0 and energy<min(coolCost, level*upgradeBaseCost) -> STALLED.

verdicts.reason: COOL fails (energy<coolCost); throttled prod=0, energy<min costs -> R-07 STALLED. Build is right.

verdicts.contract_fix: R-05: End-of-Turn Energy: throttle decided by the heat at START of turn (before R-04). energy += actualProd.
verdicts.reason: Whether this turn's heat throttles this turn (immediate) or next (inertia) materially changes play.
